visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a warehouse setting, identified as Costco. A woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white off-the-shoulder ruffled top stands in an aisle lined with orange shelving units filled with various bottled drinks. She holds two large clear plastic bottles containing a yellowish liquid with visible sediment. The lighting is bright and typical of a large retail environment. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor home environment, likely a dining or living room. The same woman is now seated at a wooden table, joined by another woman wearing a black beret and a dark semi-sheer top. They both hold glasses containing the drink from the bottles, which now includes ice. (3) A close-up shot shows the liquid being poured from the large plastic bottle into a clear glass filled with ice cubes. The glass has small red fish patterns on it. The liquid is a light green/yellow hue and contains a high density of small black chia seeds. (4) Back to the medium shot of the two women at the table. They are tasting the drink, gesturing with their hands, and discussing the product. The background shows a dimly lit interior with some furniture and birdcages visible in the distance.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 現在脆Threads上爆紅的是什麼. (2) [Variety]: 話題超高. [Slogan]: 蜂蜜檸檬奇亞籽. (3) [Subtitle]: 因為它一罐裡面就有快半罐的奇亞籽. (4) [Subtitle]: 然後這個啊一個才80多元. [Variety]: 好便宜喔. (5) [Subtitle]: 快要比手搖杯已經比手搖杯還划算了. (6) [Subtitle]: 那麼回去看看純在的吸引力有沒有厲害. (7) [Subtitle]: 這個紅的有道理. (8) [Subtitle]: 它的奇亞籽啊可以看出來是裝了半罐多. (9) [Subtitle]: 然後我覺得它最厲害的是它喝起來每一口都會剛剛好的奇亞籽比例. (10) [Subtitle]: 就不會太多讓你覺得哎好膩口或者是太少吸不到果粒. (11) [Subtitle]: 那它就是一個飲料類的東西. (12) [Subtitle]: 因為它裡面還是有加甘蔗糖. (13) [Subtitle]: 那它前面的水奇亞籽跟龍眼蜜檸檬. (14) [Subtitle]: 我覺得龍眼蜜跟檸檬的那個調配很剛好酸甜的很舒服. (15) [Subtitle]: 我們自己會再加更多的冰塊. (16) [Subtitle]: 因為它比較濃加一點冰塊我覺得會更清爽. (17) [Subtitle]: 我會自己再偷加更多的檸檬. (18) [Subtitle]: 因為我喜歡喝酸一點. (19) [Subtitle]: 嗯但以夏天的飲料來說我覺得這個放在家裡這個價格很值得很清爽.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing in the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a bucket hat with a black and white pattern and a white off-the-shoulder ruffled top. The second woman wears a black beret and a dark, sheer-sleeved top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first background is a Costco warehouse aisle with tall orange metal racks and stacked beverage products. The second background is a domestic interior with a wooden dining table, warm lighting, and household items like birdcages in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking with high energy and a bright, friendly tone, accompanied by an upbeat acoustic guitar and piano-led background music. The tempo is moderate and joyful. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition sound effect occurs as the scene changes. The narration continues at a fast pace. (3) The primary speaker is joined by a second female voice with similar clarity and pitch. Their conversation is animated, discussing the value and taste of the drink. (4) Distinct liquid pouring sounds are heard, sounding crisp and clear, layered over the continuous BGM. (5) A chime or 'ding' sound effect punctuates a specific point about the price or ingredient ratio. (6) The video concludes with both voices expressing satisfaction, maintaining a high positive valence and arousal until the track fades.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Intro -> Demonstration -> Taste Test -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review and recommend a specific trending beverage sold at Costco, highlighting its high chia seed content, cost-effectiveness compared to hand-shaken drinks, and refreshing taste profile.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically showcases the brand 'Natural Benefits' (純在) and discusses its price and value compared to other market options.
endorsementObject: Natural Benefits Honey Lemon Chia Seed Drink

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media product review featuring fast-paced editing, high-energy narration, and text overlays to keep viewers engaged.
